business_jargon.bad UX workflow: Flow fails because criteria logic mismatched
business_jargon.sales process stuck: Lead conversion blocked by validation rules
business_jargon.customer data not syncing: Data integration failure between Salesforce and external system
business_jargon.report not loading: SOQL query timeout or governor limits exceeded
business_jargon.user can't login: Authentication failure due to permission sets or profiles
business_jargon.deal not closing: Opportunity stage progression blocked by approval processes
business_jargon.system slow: Performance degradation due to inefficient queries or large data volumes
business_jargon.automation not working: Process Builder or Flow execution errors
business_jargon.permissions issue: Sharing rules or field-level security restrictions
